misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Like I said, look at everything Joyboy Haki did. You might argue that Joyboy was stronger, but you can be sure the gap between them is very,very small(equals). And if Joyboy Haki can pul
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Like I said, look at everything Joyboy Haki did. You might argue that Joyboy was stronger, but you can be sure the gap between them is very,very small(equals). And if Joyboy Haki can pull off something like that, then you can be sure Imu's will be a monster too.

misc.title: ussop: you are a coward for not fighting yourself!! imu in #ONEPIECE1179: Video

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 I'll go even further and claim that Imu might not even be able to use his Zoan form power outside the holy land... This means they'll be facing a weakened Imu, and even that will be brut
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 I'll go even further and claim that Imu might not even be able to use his Zoan form power outside the holy land... This means they'll be facing a weakened Imu, and even that will be brutal. Oda will do everything he can to show as little of Imu as possible... WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1179 When Imu lands on Elbaph, he spits blood and falls to his knees, then transforms and we see his design. (My theory that he can't leave Holy Land for long because of a curse might actually be true.) 🔥🔥🔥🔥 — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2038908313002233975#m
